$ export EMULATR_FLASH_ROM=ds20_flash.rom
export EMULATR_GATE=open:0x1adb14,close:0x1adb60,rev:8
cd /d/EmulatR/EmulatRAppUniV4/Emulatr/out/build/release
./run_fw.sh ds20 cold --max-cycles 0x10000000
